-0.0204*sin(-0.2291*x_1 + 0.6411*exp(0.8223*x_4) + 0.866*sin(0.948*x_2 - 7.5679) + 0.6136*tanh(2.948*x_3 - 3.7942) + 5.1226) - 0.1317

0.0115*(0.2646*x_1 - 0.7402*exp(0.8223*x_4) - sin(0.948*x_2 - 7.5679) - 0.7085*tanh(2.948*x_3 - 3.7942) - 0.5663)**2 + 0.0709

0.6005 - 0.0206*sin(-0.3246*x_1 + 0.9081*exp(0.8223*x_4) + 1.2268*sin(0.948*x_2 - 7.5679) + 0.8691*tanh(2.948*x_3 - 3.7942) - 3.2261)

0.3165 - 0.0356*sinh(0.182*x_1 - 0.5093*exp(0.8223*x_4) - 0.6881*sin(0.948*x_2 - 7.5679) - 0.4875*tanh(2.948*x_3 - 3.7942) + 0.0628)
